attributes.action: Increase the number of NHS dentists, ensuring availability for town capacity.
attributes.background: Each dentist locally have turned private. There are no NHS dentists in my town. My son is registered to a practice 20 miles away. Each town should be able to provide NHS services to thr residents, including dental.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Fund free NHS dentist treatment for all UK Citizens
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/741025
